title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 490.270 - Certified copies of religious records
text:
490.270.  Certified copies of religious records. — Copies of the register referred to in section 490.260, certified by the pastor or other head of any such society or congregation, or by the clerk or other keeper of such register, and verified by his affidavit in writing, shall be received in evidence.
(RSMo 1939 § 1830) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1666; 1919 § 5353; 1909 § 6298
